evals.prompt: 搜索一下 GPT-5 最新的消息
evals.expected_output: Should use ask-search to search for GPT-5 latest news
expectations: Returns search results with titles and URLs

evals.prompt: 帮我读一下这个网页 https://example.com
evals.expected_output: Should use crwlr to crawl the page and return markdown content

evals.prompt: 搜一下 Claude 4 的发布时间，然后打开找到的页面看看具体内容
evals.expected_output: Should first use ask-search to search, then use crwlr to read the found URL
expectations: First uses ask-search for the search
Then uses crwlr crawl to read the found URL
